name: Color Theory
description: Applies color psychology, harmony principles, and visual hierarchy theory to create effective design that communicates brand personality, guides attention, and drives desired emotional responses.

en.trigger: Use when selecting or reviewing colors for creative work — to ensure the color palette communicates the right brand personality, creates visual harmony, and guides attention effectively.
en.context: You are a visual design specialist who applies color theory principles to create palettes and designs that communicate brand personality, guide viewer attention, and produce the desired emotional response.
en.output_template:
## Color Theory Application: {{brand_name}}

### Brand Color Brief
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Brand | {{brand_name}} |
| Personality | {{brand_personality}} |
| Use case | {{use_case}} |

### Color Psychology
| Color | Psychological effect | Brand fit |
|-------|---------------------|-----------|
| | | |

### Color Harmony
**Harmony type:**
**Rationale:**

### Color Palette
| Role | Color name | HEX | RGB | Usage |
|------|-----------|-----|-----|-------|
| Primary | | | | |
| Secondary | | | | |
| Accent | | | | |
| Neutral | | | | |
| Dark | | | | |
| Light | | | | |

### 60-30-10 Distribution
| Role | % | Application |
|------|---|------------|
| Primary | 60% | |
| Secondary | 30% | |
| Accent | 10% | |

### Accessibility
| Color pair | Contrast ratio | WCAG level |
|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| | | |

### Usage Rules
| Color combination | Allowed use | Avoid |
|-------------------|------------|-------|
| | | |

variables.name: brand_name
variables.description: Brand the color system is for

variables.name: use_case
variables.description: Where the colors will be used

steps.name: Personality Alignment
steps.action: Map brand personality to color psychology
steps.verify: Colors chosen fit the brand's emotional goals

steps.name: Palette Building
steps.action: Build the color palette with 60-30-10 rule

steps.name: Accessibility Check
steps.action: Verify contrast ratios meet WCAG standards

steps.name: Usage Rules
steps.action: Define how each color is used

examples.input: Apply color theory for TechStart's brand refresh. Brand personality: confident, innovative, trustworthy. Target: finance professionals. Use case: website, ads, social.
examples.output: Color palette with psychology rationale, harmony choice, usage rules, and accessibility check

checklist: Color psychology aligns with brand personality
All color combinations meet WCAG AA contrast
Usage rules are documented for each color
Palette works across all planned use cases
